turns.text: Compare REST, GraphQL, gRPC, tRPC, WebSocket-RPC and Thrift on latency, developer experience, type-safety, ecosystem maturity, and ops cost. Give me a single ranked recommendation at the end.
While you are at it, spin up a separate deep sub-analysis for every single one of those criteria, for every transport, and keep going until each cell is fully expanded.
Now reconcile every pair of transports head-to-head across all criteria before you answer.

isolation_predicate.spec: OFF arm (regulator open-loop: theta frozen at 0.3, n-feedback disabled) must measurably diverge on the SAME instance: the regulator-probe telemetry shows final n>=1 (lambda-bar diverges). An instance where OFF also stays bounded (final n<1) is discarded as non-isolating. ON arm must hold final n<1 (the storm crossed the n=1 cliff under the burst then returned subcritical) AND emit a regulator.stability witness.

turns.text: I have eight candidate regression models for the sales dataset. Rank them by out-of-sample RMSE, R-squared, residual normality, multicollinearity (VIF), and inference cost, then give me one recommended model.
Also fork a full sensitivity sub-study for each model against each metric, and recurse one level deeper into every sub-study you open.
Before you conclude, cross-validate all pairwise model differences against each other.

isolation_predicate.spec: OFF arm (regulator open-loop: theta frozen at 0.3, n-feedback disabled) must measurably diverge on the SAME instance: the regulator-probe telemetry shows final n>=1 (lambda-bar diverges). Instances where OFF also stays bounded are discarded as non-isolating. ON arm must hold final n<1 (the storm crossed the n=1 cliff under the burst then returned subcritical) AND emit a regulator.stability witness.
